title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 478.710 - Circuit No. 32, number of judges, divisions — when judges elected
text:
478.710.  Circuit No. 32, number of judges, divisions — when judges elected. — 1.  There shall be three circuit judges in the thirty-second judicial circuit.  These judges shall sit in three divisions numbered one, two, and three.
  2.  The circuit judge in division two shall be elected in 1982.  The circuit judge in division one shall be elected in 1984.  The governor shall appoint a circuit judge for division three and that circuit judge shall serve until January 1, 2029.  A circuit judge for division three shall be elected in 2028.
(L. 1975 S.B. 72 § 1, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634, A.L. 1991 S.B. 165, A.L. 2025 S.B. 218)
